components.role: current operating truth for the MVP OS source repository
canonical source for tagged MVP OS releases
dependency-free conditional preflight and acceptance enforcement
non-authoritative connector, schedule, task, tool, file, and gateway runtime guidance
pull-request distribution to registered projects only

invariants: published tag points to the current source release commit
conditional gates do not burden out-of-scope projects
canonical and template skill trees remain byte-identical
external-result claims never exceed observed evidence
